description_long: This snowman is constructed from three stacked, roughly spherical snowballs of decreasing size from bottom to top, forming a classic snowman shape. Its face features two round, dark eyes and a prominent orange carrot-shaped nose, with no visible mouth. The snowman has three dark buttons vertically aligned on its torso, adding to its traditional appearance. Both arms are made from brown, branch-like sticks, each with multiple prongs, giving a playful and animated gesture. The surface of the snowman is matte white, with subtle faceting visible on the snowballs, suggesting a hand-packed, slightly irregular texture. There are no accessories such as hats or scarves, and the snowman stands upright, ready to greet passersby in a wintry urban setting.
description: A classic three-tiered snowman with stick arms, coal-like eyes, a carrot nose, and three buttons, all in a matte white finish. The snowman has no headwear or scarf and features playful, branchy arms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the snowman's face, carrot nose, coal eyes, three buttons, and both stick arms raised outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding carrot nose, profile of the coal eyes, and the side angle of the stick arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the three snowball segments and both stick arms extending outward, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the stick arm's prongs and the side profile of the snowman's head and nose.
